summary: Excellent sound‑board recording of a mixed‑quality show – crystal‑clear audio but an uneven set with only a few bright moments.
review: The tape sounds like a top‑notch digital soundboard (DSBD) capture – listeners rave about its clarity and power. Musically the night was inconsistent; Jerry had an off‑night aside from strong Bird Song, Black Peter and Look Like Rain performances, while the closing Throwing Stones fell flat for some fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording quality is repeatedly praised as excellent (soundboard), but show performance receives mixed feedback with several negative comments; the weighted average yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, powerful mix that “knocks your socks off”; multiple reviewers call it unbeatable and note the DSBD source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set swings between decent jams but overall lacks inspiration; the show feels uneven with a weak closing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: One reviewer calls it an off‑night for Jerry, though Bird Song and Black Peter are highlighted as strong moments.
